title: Little Nemo: Return to Slumberland #1
author: Eric Shanower
description: The Eisner Award-winning* tale by Eric Shanower and Gabriel Rodriguez is re-presented in a glorious deluxe, oversized package. This striking, all-ages collection includes the original four-issue series, plus never-before-seen pitch artwork from Shanower, and a detailed look at the process employed by Shanower, Rodriguez, and their editors to reinvent a celebrated property! Join Nemo as you Return to Slumberland for an experience like no other! Spinning out of Winsor McCay’s brilliant early 20th
